response.overview: During the uncertainty of the COVID-19 lockdown in Kathmandu,  Two neighbours / strangers to each other form a quiet, unspoken bond through their facing windows.  Ritu, (38) a lonely school teacher, and Mausam (22) Struggling theatre artist, finds warmth, hope and human connection in the stillness of isolation.
response.title: 𝑻𝑯𝑬 𝑾𝑰𝑵𝑫𝑶𝑾 𝑩𝑬𝑻𝑾𝑬𝑬𝑵 𝑼𝑺
